title: Ethiopian Stew in a Roasted Sugar Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious Ethiopian-inspired stew served in a roasted sugar bowl. This dish showcases the rich flavors of Ethiopia's traditional cuisine.
instructions: Roast the sugar in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until caramelized.
In a large pan, heat oil over medium heat. Add the onion, garlic, and ginger, and cook until softened.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth, roasted sugar, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the stew has thickened.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the stew in a roasted sugar bowl, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
